name: Command A+
archDisplay: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (218B total / 25B active), hybrid attention, native citation grounding, runs on 1x B200 or 2x H100 (W4A4)
note: Successor to the CC-BY-NC-licensed Command A (Mar 2025), now released fully open-weight under Apache 2.0. First Command model with native image input, expanded from 23 to 48 languages, and large agentic/enterprise gains (tau2-bench-telecom 37%->85%, Terminal-Bench-Hard agentic coding 3%->25%).

results.notes: up from 37% for Command A Reasoning

verificationNotes: Confirmed via Cohere's own blog post (cohere.com/blog/command-a-plus), independent coverage on MarkTechPost (2026-05-21), and the CohereLabs Hugging Face org (bf16/fp8/w4a4 repos for 'command-a-plus-05-2026'), which confirms Apache 2.0 license, 218B/25B MoE, 128K input / 64K output context, and 48 languages. This is a genuine gap: the existing corpus's Cohere folder stops at 'Command A' (2025-03-13, CC-BY-NC); Command A+ is a distinct, newer, more permissively licensed release.
